scripts.build: cd ../core && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && rm -rf dist && tsc && mkdir -p dist/core && cp -r ../core/dist/* dist/ && npm run debug-build
scripts.debug-build: echo 'DEBUG: Listing dist directory structure' && ls -la dist && echo 'DEBUG: Checking for core directory' && ls -la dist/core && echo 'DEBUG: Checking config.js imports' && grep -r '@core' dist/ && echo 'DEBUG: Done debugging'
